title: Lead Revenue Manager at Yum! Brands India

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Yum! Brands India
jsonLd.description:
Yum! Brands India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhubaneswar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Yum! Brands India:
Yum! Brands India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Tour Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yum! Brands India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
